title: IT Project Manager
published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
desc.1: Lead complex IT projects in a multi-client environment in Montpellier. You coordinate the technical teams and ensure delivery within the defined timelines and budgets.
mission.1: Define project scope: perimeter, schedule, budget, and risks
mission.2: Lead steering committee meetings and write minutes
mission.4: Monitor quality, cost, and timeline KPIs
mission.6: Support teams in adopting Agile methodologies
profile.1: Master's degree (Bac+5) in Computer Science or Project Management
profile.2: 3 to 7 years of experience in IT project management
profile.4: PMP or PRINCE2 certification is a plus
